object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Standard white rectangular rocker light switch mounted on the left wall at typical switch height near the bottom of the steps; plate contrasts with the beige wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: on the left wall near the base of the stairs and above the baseboard

object_b.label: table
object_b.description: small wooden end table next to left recliner
object_b.long_form_open_description: Dark-stained wooden end table with a drawer or cabinet door, placed immediately to the right of the left recliner and to the left of the fireplace. Surface holds small decorative items or a lamp base (details small/blurry).
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: between the left recliner and the left window; adjacent to the fireplace wall
